title: polypogon × littoralis
intro: Polypogon × littoralis, also known as hybrid meadow grass or coastal hair grass, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and stems, which contain flavonoids and other compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polypogon × littoralis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to make medicinal products that support overall health and well-being.
